mapper.insert:
insert into base_platform_print_template (platform_code, platform_name, platform_logistics_code, platform_logistics_name, template_id, template_type, template_name, template_url, preview_url, brand_code, template_ext_info, auto_get_flag, type, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, version, deleted_flag) values
( #{item.platformCode},#{item.platformName},#{item.platformLogisticsCode},#{item.platformLogisticsName}, #{item.templateId},#{item.templateType},#{item.templateName}, #{item.templateUrl},#{item.previewUrl},#{item.brandCode},#{item.templateExtInfo},#{item.autoGetFlag},#{item.type},#{item.state},#{item.remark},#{item.createdBy},#{item.createdName}, #{item.createdDate},#{item.version},#{item.deletedFlag} )
mapper.update:
update base_platform_print_template
state = #{state}, deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{modifiedName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where id in
#{item}
